context: Tests HomeKit timer trigger guidance and the corrected recurrence-interval pattern.

checklist.name: HomeKit setup
checklist.description: Mentions HomeKit capability, NSHomeKitUsageDescription, and waiting for HMHomeManagerDelegate before using homes.

checklist.name: Action set
checklist.description: Creates or uses an HMActionSet and adds HMCharacteristicWriteAction values for writable characteristics.

checklist.name: First fire date
checklist.description: Computes the first fire date from the next 10:30 PM wall-clock time.

checklist.name: Daily recurrence
checklist.description: Uses a recurrence interval such as DateComponents(day: 1) instead of reusing hour/minute components as the recurrence.

checklist.name: No sibling overreach
checklist.description: Does not route the HomeKit automation task into Matter commissioning or AccessorySetupKit.
